artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his trajectory.
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.
He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.
His production style is firmly rooted in the energetic rhythms of moombahton and dancehall, reflecting a distinct regional influence.
Noizekid’s work is characterized by its blend of electronic production techniques with traditional dancehall and moombahton elements.
Similar artists include ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
